title: polygala citrina
intro: Polygala citrina, also known as Yellow Milkwort, is a perennial plant species in the milkwort family (Polygalaceae). It is native to China and has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, particularly its anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The plant is said to have several health benefits, including lowering blood pressure and improving cardiovascular health, as well as having antibacterial and antiviral properties that can aid in fighting off infections. Polygala citrina can be prepared into herbal teas, tinctures, or infusions, and is often used in combination with other herbs to enhance its medicinal effects.
